name: @upriver/admin-template
description: Templates for the F05 natural-language admin: GitHub issue templates, label manifest, optional Next.js client form. Copied per-client by `upriver admin-deploy`. The webhook handler is NOT a template — it ships in @upriver/worker (serve.ts /webhook + functions/admin-webhook.ts) and is registered by default.

scripts.typecheck: echo 'template package — typechecked when copied into a client dir'
